analysis.reasoning: The tweet reports an international advisory group's statement on Ukraine's SSU reform and tags EU agencies (EUAM Ukraine, EU Delegation) along with other international actors, signaling EU-led multilateral engagement in governance reform. This aligns with EU6 (EU contributes to a better world) and, given the reform context, EU5 (global champion of fair causes) due to its focus on democracy and rule-of-law promotion.
